title: Sandwich Delight
description: Adds 25+ sandwiches with Minecraft, Farmer's Delight or any other mods ingredients.
body:
![Sandwich Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd2d087e42a4cb8153db84d4aac0e8cfe1d11cf.png)

Welcome to my mod addon **Sandwich Delight!** It an addon for **Farmer's Delight**. It adds more sandwiches since Farmer's Delight only had 3.

There's 25+ Sandwiches in the mod right now.

🔨 Required Dependencies:
  
- Farmer's Delight

➕ Compatibility:

- Apple Skin
- Crate Delight
- Create
- Diet
- JEI

**Can i use this mod in a modpack?**
Yes you can but you have to credit me.
